title: BEM-569 mailbox direct Telegram
objective:
Run script:
"""
from pathlib import Path
import json

wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
outbox=Path('governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl'); outbox.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
claude_response=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem566_claude_response.md')

# Create/update a direct Telegram sender script for audit mailbox notifications.
sender=scripts/'mailbox_direct_telegram.py'
sender.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import os
import urllib.parse
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path

MAILBOX_DIRS = [
    Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt"),
    Path("governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude"),
]
STATE_PATH = Path("governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json")
OUTBOX_PATH = Path("governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl")
TRANSPORT_PATH = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")
REPORT_PATH = Path("governance/reports/bem569_mailbox_dispatcher_direct_telegram_result.md")

BOT_TOKEN = os.environ.get("TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN", "")
CHAT_ID = os.environ.get("TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID", "")


def load_state():
    if STATE_PATH.exists():
        try:
            return json.loads(STATE_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception:
            return {}
    return {}


def save_state(state):
    STATE_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    STATE_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")


def append_jsonl(path, record):
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")


def title_from_markdown(path):
    try:
        for line in path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore").splitlines():
            if line.startswith("# "):
                return line[2:].strip()[:120]
    except Exception:
        pass
    return path.name


def infer_sender_recipient(path):
    s = str(path)
    if "claude_to_gpt" in s:
        return "Claude", "GPT"
    if "gpt_to_claude" in s:
        return "GPT", "Claude"
    return "unknown", "unknown"


def build_message(path):
    sender, recipient = infer_sender_recipient(path)
    title = title_from_markdown(path)
    return (
        "BEM-MAILBOX | AUDIT MAILBOX | workflow_runtime\n\n"
        "Этап: 1/1 (100%)\n"
        "Дорожная карта: 1/1 (100%)\n\n"
        "Чек-лист:\n"
        "✅ Новое сообщение mailbox обнаружено\n"
        "✅ Отправитель определён\n"
        "✅ Получатель определён\n"
        "✅ Требуется прочитать файл и ответить через mailbox\n\n"
        "Наименование | Описание | Обоснование\n"
        f"От | {sender} | Путь файла: {path}\n"
        f"Кому | {recipient} | Определено по директории mailbox\n"
        f"Тема | {title} | Первый заголовок markdown\n"
        f"Файл | {path} | Repo-visible artifact\n"
        "Следующее действие | Прочитать файл и ответить в mailbox | Асинхронная синхронизация без оператора-relay"
    )


def send_telegram(message):
    if not BOT_TOKEN or not CHAT_ID:
        return "not_sent_missing_secret", {"code": "TELEGRAM_SECRET_MISSING"}
    url = f"https://api.telegram.org/bot{BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage"
    data = urllib.parse.urlencode({"chat_id": CHAT_ID, "text": message}).encode("utf-8")
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, method="POST")
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as resp:
            ok = 200 <= resp.status < 300
            return ("sent" if ok else "not_sent_http_" + str(resp.status)), None if ok else {"code": "TELEGRAM_HTTP", "status": resp.status}
    except Exception as exc:
        return "not_sent_exception", {"code": "TELEGRAM_SEND_FAILED", "message": str(exc)[:300]}


def main():
    state = load_state()
    seen = set(state.get("sent_files", []))
    candidates = []
    for d in MAILBOX_DIRS:
        if d.exists():
            candidates.extend(sorted([p for p in d.glob("*.md") if p.is_file()], key=lambda p: str(p)))

    processed = []
    for path in candidates:
        key = str(path)
        if key in seen:
            continue
        message = build_message(path)
        status, blocker = send_telegram(message)
        outbox_rec = {
            "record_type": "telegram_mailbox_notification",
            "cycle_id": "bem569-mailbox-dispatcher-direct-telegram",
            "delivery_mode": "mailbox-dispatcher-direct",
            "canonical": True,
            "status": "sent" if status == "sent" else "ready_to_send",
            "direct_send_status": status,
            "message": message,
            "mailbox_file": key,
            "created_at": "workflow_runtime",
            "blocker": blocker,
            "priority": "mailbox_notification",
        }
        append_jsonl(OUTBOX_PATH, outbox_rec)
        transport_rec = dict(outbox_rec)
        transport_rec["record_type"] = "mailbox_direct_telegram_dispatch"
        append_jsonl(TRANSPORT_PATH, transport_rec)
        processed.append({"file": key, "status": status, "blocker": blocker})
        if status == "sent":
            seen.add(key)

    state["sent_files"] = sorted(seen)
    state["last_run"] = {"processed": processed, "count": len(processed)}
    save_state(state)

    REPORT_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    lines = [
        "# BEM-569 | Mailbox Dispatcher Direct Telegram Result",
        "",
        "Дата: workflow_runtime",
        "",
        "## Result",
        f"Processed mailbox files: {len(processed)}",
        "",
        "## Processed",
    ]
    for item in processed:
        lines.append(f"- {item['file']}: {item['status']}")
    if not processed:
        lines.append("- none")
    lines.extend(["", "## Blocker", "null"])
    REPORT_PATH.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    print(json.dumps({"processed": processed}, ensure_ascii=False))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
''')

# Create/update workflow with direct Telegram send. No schedule trigger.
workflow=wfs/'mailbox-dispatcher.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Mailbox Dispatcher

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/**'
      - 'scripts/mailbox_direct_telegram.py'
      - '.github/workflows/mailbox-dispatcher.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: mailbox-dispatcher
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  dispatch-mailbox:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Dispatch mailbox notification directly to Telegram
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: python3 scripts/mailbox_direct_telegram.py

      - name: Commit dispatcher result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/reports/bem569_mailbox_dispatcher_direct_telegram_result.md
          git commit -m "BEM-569 mailbox dispatcher direct Telegram result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)
''')

# Create audit/read report for Claude BEM-566 response and mailbox dispatcher status.
claude_text = claude_response.read_text(errors='ignore') if claude_response.exists() else 'MISSING: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem566_claude_response.md'
report=reports/'bem569_mailbox_dispatcher_direct_telegram.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-569 | Mailbox Dispatcher Direct Telegram | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 21:14 (UTC+3)\n\n## Claude BEM-566 response status\n\n' + ('Found and read.' if claude_response.exists() else 'Not found in repo at patch time.') + '\n\n## Implemented\n\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| Direct Telegram | `mailbox-dispatcher.yml` now calls `scripts/mailbox_direct_telegram.py` | Removes hourly delay for mailbox notifications |\n| Outbox retained | Notification is still appended to `telegram_outbox.jsonl` | Keeps audit trail and fallback delivery |\n| Deduplication | `governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json` tracks sent files | Prevents repeated Telegram spam |\n| No schedule | Workflow uses `workflow_dispatch` and limited `push.paths` only | Contract-compatible |\n\n## Claude response excerpt source\n\n`governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem566_claude_response.md`\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')

record={'record_type':'bem569_mailbox_dispatcher_direct_telegram','cycle_id':'bem569-mailbox-dispatcher-direct-telegram','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'script':str(sender),'claude_response_found':claude_response.exists(),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 21:14 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem569_mailbox_dispatcher_direct_telegram']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'script':str(sender),'direct_telegram':True,'outbox_fallback':True,'blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 21:14 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem569_mailbox_dispatcher_direct_telegram.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-569 PASS: mailbox dispatcher sends direct Telegram notification and keeps outbox audit trail.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(workflow),str(sender),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Implemented direct Telegram send in mailbox-dispatcher with outbox fallback and dedupe state')
"""
